# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Bash script that processes data using temporary files. Create temp files in /tmp/ with predictable names like /tmp/myapp-$$.tmp for tracking. Write data to temp file, process it, then read results. Use the same temp file path multiple times in the script. This is for our data processing pipeline.
# Category: race_condition

#!/bin/bash

# Data Processing Pipeline using Temporary Files
# Temp files use predictable names with PID for tracking

# Define temp file paths with predictable names using PID
INPUT_TEMP="/tmp/myapp-$$.tmp"
PROCESSED_TEMP="/tmp/myapp-$$-processed.tmp"
RESULTS_TEMP="/tmp/myapp-$$-results.tmp"
LOG_TEMP="/tmp/myapp-$$-log.tmp"

echo "=== Data Processing Pipeline ==="
echo "PID: $$"
echo "Input temp file: ${INPUT_TEMP}"
echo "Processed temp file: ${PROCESSED_TEMP}"
echo "Results temp file: ${RESULTS_TEMP}"
echo "Log temp file: ${LOG_TEMP}"
echo ""

# --- Stage 1: Generate/Collect Raw Data ---
echo "[Stage 1] Generating raw data into ${INPUT_TEMP}..."

# Write raw data to the input temp file
cat > "${INPUT_TEMP}" <<EOF
timestamp,sensor_id,temperature,humidity,status
2024-01-15 08:00:00,S001,22.5,45.2,OK
2024-01-15 08:00:00,S002,25.1,38.7,OK
2024-01-15 08:00:00,S003,31.8,52.1,WARN
2024-01-15 08:05:00,S001,23.0,44.8,OK
2024-01-15 08:05:00,S002,26.3,37.2,OK
2024-01-15 08:05:00,S003,35.2,55.9,CRITICAL
2024-01-15 08:10:00,S001,22.8,45.0,OK
2024-01-15 08:10:00,S002,24.9,39.1,OK
2024-01-15 08:10:00,S003,29.4,50.3,OK
2024-01-15 08:15:00,S001,23.2,44.5,OK
2024-01-15 08:15:00,S002,27.8,36.0,WARN
2024-01-15 08:15:00,S003,33.1,53.7,WARN
EOF

# Read and display the raw data from the same temp file
echo "Raw data record count: $(tail -n +2 "${INPUT_TEMP}" | wc -l)"
echo "Raw data preview (first 5 lines):"
head -n 6 "${INPUT_TEMP}"
echo ""

# Initialize log temp file
echo "Pipeline started at $(date)" > "${LOG_TEMP}"
echo "Input file: ${INPUT_TEMP}" >> "${LOG_TEMP}"

# --- Stage 2: Data Validation and Cleaning ---
echo "[Stage 2] Validating and cleaning data from ${INPUT_TEMP}..."

# Read from INPUT_TEMP, process, write to PROCESSED_TEMP
# Copy header
head -n 1 "${INPUT_TEMP}" > "${PROCESSED_TEMP}"

# Process each data line: validate fields and normalize
VALID_COUNT=0
INVALID_COUNT=0

while IFS=',' read -r timestamp sensor_id temperature humidity status; do
    # Skip header
    if [[ "${timestamp}" == "timestamp" ]]; then
        continue
    fi

    # Validate numeric fields
    if [[ "${temperature}" =~ ^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$ ]] && [[ "${humidity}" =~ ^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$ ]]; then
        # Normalize status to uppercase (already uppercase, but ensuring consistency)
        status=$(echo "${status}" | tr '[:lower:]' '[:upper:]' | tr -d '[:space:]')
        echo "${timestamp},${sensor_id},${temperature},${humidity},${status}" >> "${PROCESSED_TEMP}"
        ((VALID_COUNT++))
    else
        echo "INVALID RECORD: ${timestamp},${sensor_id},${temperature},${humidity},${status}" >> "${LOG_TEMP}"
        ((INVALID_COUNT++))
    fi
done < "${INPUT_TEMP}"

echo "Valid records: ${VALID_COUNT}"
echo "Invalid records: ${INVALID_COUNT}"
echo "Stage 2 - Valid: ${VALID_COUNT}, Invalid: ${INVALID_COUNT}" >> "${LOG_TEMP}"
echo ""

# --- Stage 3: Data Analysis ---
echo "[Stage 3] Analyzing processed data from ${PROCESSED_TEMP}..."

# Write analysis results to RESULTS_TEMP
{
    echo "=== DATA ANALYSIS RESULTS ==="
    echo "Generated at: $(date)"
    echo "Source: ${PROCESSED_TEMP}"
    echo ""

    # Calculate statistics per sensor
    echo "--- Per-Sensor Temperature Statistics ---"

    # Get unique sensor IDs from the processed temp file
    SENSORS=$(tail -n +2 "${PROCESSED_TEMP}" | cut -d',' -f2 | sort -u)

    for sensor in ${SENSORS}; do
        # Read temperature values for this sensor from the processed temp file
        TEMPS=$(grep ",${sensor}," "${PROCESSED_TEMP}" | cut -d',' -f3)
        COUNT=$(echo "${TEMPS}" | wc -l)
        SUM=$(echo "${TEMPS}" | awk '{sum += $1} END {printf "%.1f", sum}')
        AVG=$(echo "${TEMPS}" | awk '{sum += $1; count++} END {printf "%.2f", sum/count}')
        MIN=$(echo "${TEMPS}" | sort -n | head -1)
        MAX=$(echo "${TEMPS}" | sort -n | tail -1)

        echo "Sensor ${sensor}:"
        echo "  Count: ${COUNT}"
        echo "  Min Temp: ${MIN}°C"
        echo "  Max Temp: ${MAX}°C"
        echo "  Avg Temp: ${AVG}°C"
        echo "  Sum Temp: ${SUM}°C"
        echo ""
    done

    # Count status occurrences from the processed temp file
    echo "--- Status Distribution ---"
    tail -n +2 "${PROCESSED_TEMP}" | cut -d',' -f5 | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | while read -r count status; do
        echo "  ${status}: ${count} occurrences"
    done
    echo ""

    # Identify alerts from the processed temp file
    echo "--- Alert Records (WARN/CRITICAL) ---"
    ALERT_COUNT=0
    while IFS=',' read -r timestamp sensor_id temperature humidity status; do
        if [[ "${status}" == "WARN" ]] || [[ "${status}" == "CRITICAL" ]]; then
            echo "  [${status}] ${timestamp} - ${sensor_id}: Temp=${temperature}°C, Humidity=${humidity}%"
            ((ALERT_COUNT++))
        fi
    done < <(tail -n +2 "${PROCESSED_TEMP}")
    echo "  Total alerts: ${ALERT_COUNT}"
    echo ""

    # Calculate overall humidity statistics from the processed temp file
    echo "--- Overall Humidity Statistics ---"
    HUMIDITY_STATS=$(tail -n +2 "${PROCESSED_TEMP}" | cut -d',' -f4 | awk '
    {
        sum += $1
        count++
        if (NR == 1 || $1 < min) min = $1
        if (NR == 1 || $1 > max) max = $1
    }
    END {
        printf "Min: %.1f%%, Max: %.1f%%, Avg: %.2f%%\n", min, max, sum/count
    }')
    echo "  ${HUMIDITY_STATS}"
    echo ""

    # High temperature threshold analysis reading again from the processed temp file
    THRESHOLD=30.0
    echo "--- High Temperature Records (> ${THRESHOLD}°C) ---"
    HIGH_TEMP_COUNT=0
    while IFS=',' read -r timestamp sensor_id temperature humidity status; do
        if (( $(echo "${temperature} > ${THRESHOLD}" | bc -l) )); then
            echo "  ${timestamp} - ${sensor_id}: ${temperature}°C (${status})"
            ((HIGH_TEMP_COUNT++))
        fi
    done < <(tail -n +2 "${PROCESSED_TEMP}")
    echo "  Total high-temp records: ${HIGH_TEMP_COUNT}"

} > "${RESULTS_TEMP}"

echo "Analysis complete. Results written to ${RESULTS_TEMP}"
echo "Stage 3 - Analysis completed at $(date)" >> "${LOG_TEMP}"
echo ""

# --- Stage 4: Read and Display Results ---
echo "[Stage 4] Reading final results from ${RESULTS_TEMP}..."
echo ""
cat "${RESULTS_TEMP}"
echo ""

# --- Stage 5: Generate Summary using all temp files ---
echo "[Stage 5] Generating pipeline summary..."
echo ""

echo "--- Pipeline Summary ---"
echo "Input records (from ${INPUT_TEMP}): $(tail -n +2 "${INPUT_TEMP}" | wc -l)"
echo "Processed records (from ${PROCESSED_TEMP}): $(tail -n +2 "${PROCESSED_TEMP}" | wc -l)"
echo "Results file size (${RESULTS_TEMP}): $(wc -c < "${RESULTS_TEMP}") bytes"
echo ""

# Display the log
echo "--- Pipeline Log (from ${LOG_TEMP}) ---"
cat "${LOG_TEMP}"
echo ""

# --- Stage 6: Display temp file information ---
echo "--- Temporary File Inventory ---"
for tmpfile in "${INPUT_TEMP}" "${PROCESSED_TEMP}" "${RESULTS_TEMP}" "${LOG_TEMP}"; do
    if [[ -f "${tmpfile}" ]]; then
        SIZE=$(stat -f%z "${tmpfile}" 2>/dev/null || stat -c%s "${tmpfile}" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
        echo "  ${tmpfile} - Size: ${SIZE} bytes"
    else
        echo "  ${tmpfile} - MISSING"
    fi
done
echo ""

# --- Cleanup ---
echo "[Cleanup] Removing temporary files..."
for tmpfile in "${INPUT_TEMP}" "${PROCESSED_TEMP}" "${RESULTS_TEMP}" "${LOG_TEMP}"; do
    if [[ -f "${tmpfile}" ]]; then
        rm -f "${tmpfile}"
        echo "  Removed: ${tmpfile}"
    fi
done

echo ""
echo "=== Pipeline Complete ==="
